Loại CK phát hành — IDS.company_securities_issuance.security_type_cd. Scheme: IDS_ISSUANCE_SECURITY_TYPE
Loại hình chào bán (PUBLIC/PRIVATE/ESOP/DIVIDEND/OWNER_CAPITAL/OTHER) — PK component 2. ETL sinh 1 row per loại hình có qty > 0.

Pivot qty dự kiến theo loại hình từ bảng Public Company Securities Offering — PUBLIC: Planned Existing Shareholder Offering Quantity + Planned Auction Offering Quantity + Planned Public Other Offering Quantity + Planned Public Company Offering Quantity; PRIVATE: Planned Private Placement Offering Quantity; ESOP: Planned ESOP Issuance Quantity + Planned Bonus Share Issuance Quantity; DIVIDEND: Planned Dividend Issuance Quantity; OWNER_CAPITAL: Planned Owner Capital Issuance Quantity; OTHER: Planned Security Quantity − (PUBLIC_qty + PRIVATE_qty + ESOP_qty + DIVIDEND_qty + OWNER_CAPITAL_qty).

Pivot giá trị dự kiến (qty × price) theo loại hình từ bảng Public Company Securities Offering — PUBLIC: (Planned Existing Shareholder Offering Quantity × Planned Existing Shareholder Offering Price) + (Planned Auction Offering Quantity × Planned Auction Offering Price) + (Planned Public Other Offering Quantity × Planned Public Other Offering Price) + (Planned Public Company Offering Quantity × Planned Public Company Offering Price); PRIVATE: Planned Private Placement Offering Quantity × Planned Private Placement Offering Price; ESOP: (Planned ESOP Issuance Quantity × Planned ESOP Issuance Price) + (Planned Bonus Share Issuance Quantity × Planned Bonus Share Issuance Price); DIVIDEND: NULL — Silver không có price field; OWNER_CAPITAL: NULL — Silver không có price field; OTHER: Planned Proceeds Amount − (PUBLIC_amount + PRIVATE_amount + ESOP_amount).

Pivot đối tượng chào bán dự kiến theo loại hình từ bảng Public Company Securities Offering — PUBLIC: NULL — không có target text; PRIVATE: Planned Private Placement Offering Target; ESOP: COALESCE(Planned ESOP Issuance Target, Planned Bonus Share Issuance Target); DIVIDEND: NULL; OWNER_CAPITAL: Planned Owner Capital Issuance Source; OTHER: NULL.

Pivot số lượng CK phát hành cho NLĐ dự kiến từ bảng Public Company Securities Offering — ESOP: Planned ESOP Issuance Quantity + Planned Bonus Share Issuance Quantity; PUBLIC/PRIVATE/DIVIDEND/OWNER_CAPITAL/OTHER: NULL.

Pivot qty thực tế theo loại hình từ bảng Public Company Securities Offering — PUBLIC: Result Existing Shareholder Offering Quantity + Result Auction Offering Quantity + Result Public Other Offering Quantity + Result Public Company Offering Quantity; PRIVATE: Result Private Placement Offering Quantity; ESOP: Result ESOP Issuance Quantity + Result Bonus Share Issuance Quantity; DIVIDEND: Result Dividend Issuance Quantity; OWNER_CAPITAL: Result Owner Capital Issuance Quantity; OTHER: Successful Security Quantity − (PUBLIC_qty + PRIVATE_qty + ESOP_qty + DIVIDEND_qty + OWNER_CAPITAL_qty).

Pivot giá trị thực tế (qty × price) theo loại hình từ bảng Public Company Securities Offering — PUBLIC: (Result Existing Shareholder Offering Quantity × Result Existing Shareholder Offering Price) + (Result Auction Offering Quantity × Result Auction Offering Price) + (Result Public Other Offering Quantity × Result Public Other Offering Price) + (Result Public Company Offering Quantity × Result Public Company Offering Price); PRIVATE: Result Private Placement Offering Quantity × Result Private Placement Offering Price; ESOP: (Result ESOP Issuance Quantity × Result ESOP Issuance Price) + (Result Bonus Share Issuance Quantity × Result Bonus Share Issuance Price); DIVIDEND: NULL — Silver không có price field; OWNER_CAPITAL: NULL — Silver không có price field; OTHER: Actual Proceeds Amount − (PUBLIC_amount + PRIVATE_amount + ESOP_amount).

Pivot đối tượng chào bán thực tế theo loại hình từ bảng Public Company Securities Offering — PUBLIC: NULL — không có target text; PRIVATE: Result Private Placement Offering Target; ESOP: COALESCE(Result ESOP Issuance Target, Result Bonus Share Issuance Target); DIVIDEND: NULL; OWNER_CAPITAL: Result Owner Capital Issuance Source; OTHER: NULL.

Pivot số lượng CK phát hành cho NLĐ thực tế từ bảng Public Company Securities Offering — ESOP: Result ESOP Issuance Quantity + Result Bonus Share Issuance Quantity; PUBLIC/PRIVATE/DIVIDEND/OWNER_CAPITAL/OTHER: NULL.
